name: Fabulous Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Graham Cracker Crust:
Combine all ingredients and press into the bottom of a buttered 10-inch spring-form pan.
Cheesecake:
1. Combine cream cheese and cottage cheese; beat until smooth and creamy.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well.
3. Add eggs and beat until well mixed.
4. Add cornstarch, flour, lemon juice, and vanilla, beating until smooth.
5. Add melted butter and sour cream, beating until smooth.
6. Pour filling into the graham cracker crust.
7. Bake in a preheated oven set to 325°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes or until firm around the edges.
8. Turn off the oven. Let cheesecake stand in the oven with the door closed for 2 hours.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool completely. Remove from the pan and chill.
Top with Blueberry Glaze. Chill again for 10 to 12 hours, if possible before serving.
Blueberry Glaze:
Combine sugar and cornstarch in a small saucepan. Blend thoroughly.
Gradually stir in blueberry juice (canned).
Crush half a cup of drained blueberries and add to the sugar mixture in the pan.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and boils.
Continue boiling for about 2 minutes or until the mixture is clear and transparent.
Cool. Arrange remaining blueberries over the top of the thoroughly chilled cheesecake.
Pour cooled glaze over the blueberries. Chill.
